title: Selected Citations from the Jewish-Christian Gospels
source_edition: Origen, Jerome, and Epiphanius citations preserved in the Patrologia Graeca and Patrologia Latina (Migne). Public domain. Standard scholarly compilation: A.F.J. Klijn, *Jewish-Christian Gospel Tradition* (Brill, 1992).
date_of_composition: Citations preserved in patristic works of 3rd–4th century; underlying gospel sources 2nd century.
scope_note: Three patristic citations: Origen's GHeb agraphon, Jerome's GHeb appearance to James, Epiphanius's Ebionite baptism account.
completeness_note: Greek/Latin text not yet sourced into this JSON corpus; pending follow-up session.
follow_up_needed: Fetch Greek text of: (1) Origen's *Commentary on John* 2.12 and *Homilies on Jeremiah* 15.4 (PG 13); (2) Jerome's *De viris illustribus* 2 (PL 23); (3) Epiphanius's *Panarion* 30.13 (PG 41).
